title: AnvilCraft: Curios
body:
* 为铁砧工艺添加 Curios 的支持
  * 在安装Curios与本模组时，可以将铁砧工艺的铁砧锤、飘升机背包和护符放入本模组提供的饰品栏位并生效
* Add Curios support to AnvilCraft
  * When installing Curios and this mod, you can place the Anvil Hammer, Ionocraft Backpack, and Charms from AnvilCraft into the accessory slots provided by this mod, and they will take effect.
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BtnFZV4n/images/f486f3ecb1a50717ebbbd6b9d06c817a76c40371.png)
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BtnFZV4n/images/470fefaa3da38d38f5f9d13cc940309410a39598.png)
